title: Create Live Radio
description: Adds a placeable radio block capable of streaming real internet radio stations directly into your game world.
body:
﻿

Live Radio Mod

A NeoForge mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 that adds a placeable steampunk-style radio block capable of streaming real internet radio stations directly into your game world.

Features

  • Radio Block — a decorative block you can place anywhere in your world. Right-click it to open the station selector GUI.
  • Live Internet Radio — streams real radio stations over the internet with positional 3D audio. The closer you are to the block, the louder it plays.
  • Country / Region Selection — choose from a wide range of countries (Germany, USA, UK, France, Japan, South Korea, Austria, Brazil, Russia, Jamaica, Egypt, and more) and pick a station from each region.
  • Dynamic Station Fetching — on the client, stations are fetched live from a radio browser API. Fallback station lists are provided for offline use.

Requirements

DependencyVersion
Minecraft1.21.1
NeoForge21.1+
JEI (optional)19+

Create Aeronautics

The Radio Mod fully supports physics-based moving structures. When placed on a moving vehicle (e.g. an airship built with Create Aeronautics, the radio block moves along with it. The audio position is continuously updated to follow the block's world position, so the sound stays anchored to the radio wherever it travels.
